title: ‘Getting it right matters to us’: Spotify defends its AI song summaries tool after singer Lorde slammed it for its flaws, and users are catching on to its potential harms
summary: That said, Spotify isn’t the only music platform that dives into the background of music — Apple Music includes detailed summaries of albums located under the Play button — but these pockets of context are all written and developed by Apple Music’s…
